message.content:
The tool cards you specified are not visible in the provided webpage section. The "TOOLS" section in the footer lists text links (Canvas Designer, Image Clipper, Mockup Generator, Effects Studio) rather than small grid cards with icons. No tool cards matching the described visual style (small grid cards with icons) appear in the visible content.

The visual quality of the tool card grid (if it existed) cannot be described as none are present. The footer's "TOOLS" section uses a simple text list format with no grid or card-based layout.
